failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, below required 28.4 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Increase BPR setting to at least 28.4 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reaction by-products in 0.57 mm tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly flush system with solvent to prevent buildup

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at Q=3.49748 mL/min with BPR set to 28.4 bar for 60 min; monitor pressure stability
Run blank solvent at T=120°C for 60 min; monitor for signs of cavitation
Perform continuous flow with reaction mixture for 120 min; inspect tubing for blockages
